title: spicanta lanceolata
intro: Spicanta lanceolata, also known as Spilanthes lanceolata, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Americas and Africa. The medicinal properties of Spicanta lanceolata lie in its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds that exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation and pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as oral infections and digestive issues. Spicanta lanceolata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine as a mouthwash to treat gum inflammation and oral ulcers.
